name_en: 💝💝Genuine Leather💝💝 M23640 Black M23698 White This OnTheGo East West bag introduces the OnTheGo small tote design, reinterpreting the East West ample silhouette with Monogram Empreinte leather. Giant Monogram is embossed on the leather body, and the tidy interior can hold daily essentials. Top handle and detachable leather chain shoulder strap allow for various carrying ways. Dimensions: 25 x 13 x 10cm
